CustomField.description: DeveloperName of the NEPA_Process_Model__mdt record governing this process. Stored as Text because Custom Metadata Types cannot be Lookup targets from custom objects. Maps to the CEQ standard process_instance.process_model foreign key.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: DeveloperName of the governing process model (e.g., EIS_Standard, CE_BLM).
CustomField.label: Process Model ID
